title: Wasp Nest Killer Foam Spray – 600ml Fast-Acting Aerosol for Indoor & Outdoor Use – Powerful Foam Wasp Spray for Safe & Effective
bullet_points: Rapid Knockdown Formula - The wasp nest killer foam contains fast-acting insecticidal agents that instantly immobilize wasps upon contact. This rapid knockdown significantly reduces the risk of stings, especially during aggressive nest activity. Wasps hit by the foam are paralyzed within seconds, ensuring user safety and immediate effectiveness.

Clinging, Non-Drip Formulation - Unlike liquid sprays that may run off or evaporate, the foam of this wasp killer spray clings tightly to vertical surfaces and stays intact within the nest structure. This ensures continuous exposure to the active ingredients and increases effectiveness by maintaining contact with the nest over time.

Indoor & Outdoor Use - This wasp nest spray is suitable for attics, garages, sheds, and roof spaces when used with proper ventilation. Always spray in well-ventilated areas (open windows and use fans if indoors), avoid confined spaces like bathrooms or cupboards, vacate the area immediately after use, and keep children and pets away until the area is fully aired out and dry.

Residual Killing Power - In addition to its instant action, the wasp spray foam leaves behind a residual insecticide barrier that remains active for several hours or even days. This ensures that any wasps returning to the nest after initial treatment are also killed upon contact with the foam residue.
Satisfaction Guaranteed - We stand behind our product with a 100% warranty. If you have any issues with our wasp nest killer, simply reach out to us, and we’ll make it right!
